description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a dark brown surface and a minimalist design. On the left side, it features a set of two drawers and an open shelf above them, all integrated into a solid block that serves as one of the desk's supports. The right side is supported by a metal frame with a geometric, open structure, giving the desk a contemporary look. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for writing, working, or placing electronic devices. The drawers have simple, horizontal handles, and the overall construction appears sturdy and functional. The materials suggest a combination of wood or engineered wood for the main body and metal for the supporting frame.
description: A modern, dark brown desk with two drawers, an open shelf, and a metal frame support on one side. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for work or study.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the drawers, open shelf, and metal frame support.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the open space beneath the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of the drawer unit and the metal frame on the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the solid block of drawers and the handles, with the desk's length visible.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open shelf is intended to face the user, serving as the front, while the open metal frame is on the user's right.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or writing desk in an office or home study
